一、MySQL 语法详解1.1 数据类型数值类型-- 整数类型TINYINT          -- 1字节，范围 -128 到 127SMALLINT         -- 2字节，范围 -32768 到 32767MEDIUMINT        -- 3字节，范围 -8388608 到 8388607INT/INTEGER      -- 4字节，范围 -2147483648 到 2147483647BIGINT           -- 8字节，范围 -9223372036854775808 到 9223372036854775807-- 浮点数类型FLOAT            -- 单精度浮点数DOUBLE           -- 双精度浮点数DECIMAL(M,D)     -- 精确小数，M为总位数，D为小数位数-- 示例CREATE TABLE numbers (    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,    tiny_col TINYINT,    small_col SMALLINT,    int_col INT,    big_col BIGINT,    float_col FLOAT(10,2),    double_col DOUBLE(15,4),    decimal_col DECIMAL(10,2));
字符串类型-- 定长字符串CHAR(M)          -- 固定长度，最大255字符VARCHAR(M)       -- 可变长度，最大65535字符-- 文本类型TINYTEXT         -- 最大255字符TEXT             -- 最大65535字符MEDIUMTEXT       -- 最大16777215字符LONGTEXT         -- 最大4294967295字符-- 二进制类型BINARY(M)        -- 定长二进制VARBINARY(M)     -- 可变长二进制BLOB             -- 二进制大对象-- 示例CREATE TABLE strings (    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,    char_col CHAR(10),    varchar_col VARCHAR(100),    text_col TEXT,    blob_col BLOB);
日期时间类型DATE             -- 日期 'YYYY-MM-DD'，范围 '1000-01-01' 到 '9999-12-31'TIME             -- 时间 'HH:MM:SS'，范围 '-838:59:59' 到 '838:59:59'DATETIME         -- 日期时间 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'，范围 '1000-01-01 00:00:00' 到 '9999-12-31 23:59:59'TIMESTAMP        -- 时间戳，范围 '1970-01-01 00:00:01' UTC 到 '2038-01-19 03:14:07' UTCYEAR             -- 年份，范围 1901 到 2155-- 示例CREATE TABLE dates (    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,    date_col DATE,    time_col TIME,    datetime_col DATETIME,    timestamp_col TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,    year_col YEAR);
JSON 类型（MySQL 5.7+）-- JSON 类型CREATE TABLE json_table (    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,    data JSON);-- 插入 JSONINSERT INTO json_table (data) VALUES ('{"name": "张三", "age": 25, "skills": ["Java", "Python"]}');
1.2 DDL（数据定义语言）创建数据库和表-- 创建数据库CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS mydb CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;-- 使用数据库USE mydb;-- 创建表CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS employees (    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '员工ID',    emp_no VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE COMMENT '员工编号',    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名',    gender ENUM('男', '女') DEFAULT '男' COMMENT '性别',    age TINYINT UNSIGNED COMMENT '年龄',    department VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '部门',    salary DECIMAL(10,2) COMMENT '薪资',    hire_date DATE COMMENT '入职日期',    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE COMMENT '邮箱',    phone VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '电话',    address TEXT COMMENT '地址',    status TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态：1-在职，0-离职',    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',    INDEX idx_department (department),    INDEX idx_hire_date (hire_date),    FULLTEXT INDEX idx_name (name)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='员工表';
修改表结构-- 添加列ALTER TABLE employees ADD COLUMN birthday DATE AFTER age;-- 修改列ALTER TABLE employees MODIFY COLUMN age SMALLINT UNSIGNED;-- 重命名列ALTER TABLE employees CHANGE COLUMN birthday birth_date DATE;-- 删除列ALTER TABLE employees DROP COLUMN address;-- 添加索引ALTER TABLE employees ADD INDEX idx_email (email);-- 添加外键ALTER TABLE employees ADD CONSTRAINT fk_department FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES departments(id);-- 删除外键ALTER TABLE employees DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_department;
删除表和数据库-- 删除表DROP TABLE IF EXISTS employees;-- 清空表（保留结构）TRUNCATE TABLE employees;-- 删除数据库DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS mydb;
1.3 DML（数据操作语言）插入数据-- 插入单行INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, gender, age, department, salary, hire_date, email, phone) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三', '男', 28, '技术部', 8000.00, '2020-01-15', 'zhangsan@example.com', '13800138000');-- 插入多行INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, gender, age, department, salary, hire_date, email) VALUES ('EMP002', '李四', '女', 25, '市场部', 7500.00, '2020-03-20', 'lisi@example.com'),('EMP003', '王五', '男', 32, '技术部', 12000.00, '2019-06-10', 'wangwu@example.com'),('EMP004', '赵六', '女', 29, '财务部', 9000.00, '2021-02-01', 'zhaoliu@example.com');-- 插入时忽略重复INSERT IGNORE INTO employees (emp_no, name) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三');-- 存在则更新，不存在则插入INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, salary) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三', 8500.00) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE salary = VALUES(salary);-- 从其他表插入INSERT INTO employees_backup SELECT * FROM employees WHERE hire_date < '2022-01-01';
查询数据-- 基本查询SELECT * FROM employees;SELECT id, name, department, salary FROM employees;-- 条件查询SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department = '技术部';SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > 8000 AND age < 35;SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department IN ('技术部', '市场部');SELECT * FROM employees WHERE name LIKE '%三%';SELECT * FROM employees WHERE hire_date BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2021-12-31';-- 排序SELECT * FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC, hire_date ASC;-- 限制结果数量SELECT * FROM employees LIMIT 10;SELECT * FROM employees LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;  -- 第21-30条-- 去重SELECT DISTINCT department FROM employees;-- 分组和聚合SELECT department, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(salary) as avg_salary FROM employees GROUP BY department;-- HAVING 子句（分组后过滤）SELECT department, AVG(salary) as avg_salary FROM employees GROUP BY department HAVING AVG(salary) > 8000;-- 连接查询-- 内连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e INNER JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 左连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 右连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e RIGHT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 全连接（MySQL不直接支持，用UNION模拟）SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.idUNIONSELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e RIGHT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 子查询SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees);-- EXISTS 子查询SELECT * FROM employees e WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.employee_id = e.id);-- CASE 表达式SELECT name, salary,    CASE         WHEN salary >= 10000 THEN '高薪'        WHEN salary >= 8000 THEN '中薪'        ELSE '低薪'    END as salary_levelFROM employees;
更新数据-- 基本更新UPDATE employees SET salary = 8500 WHERE id = 1;-- 更新多列UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.1, status = 1 WHERE department = '技术部';-- 更新时使用子查询UPDATE employees eSET salary = (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees WHERE department = e.department)WHERE age > 30;
删除数据-- 删除单行DELETE FROM employees WHERE id = 1;-- 删除多行DELETE FROM employees WHERE hire_date < '2019-01-01';-- 清空表（保留结构）TRUNCATE TABLE employees;
1.4 DCL（数据控制语言）-- 授予权限GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE ON mydb.* TO 'appuser'@'%';-- 授予所有权限GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON mydb.* TO 'admin'@'%';-- 撤销权限REVOKE DELETE ON mydb.* FROM 'appuser'@'%';-- 刷新权限FLUSH PRIVILEGES;-- 查看用户权限SHOW GRANTS FOR 'appuser'@'%';
1.5 事务控制-- 启动事务START TRANSACTION;-- 或BEGIN;-- 执行操作INSERT INTO accounts (user_id, balance) VALUES (1, 1000);UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - 100 WHERE user_id = 1;-- 提交事务COMMIT;-- 回滚事务ROLLBACK;-- 设置保存点SAVEPOINT sp1;ROLLBACK TO sp1;
1.6 常用函数字符串函数SELECT     CONCAT('Hello', ' ', 'World') as concat_result,        -- 拼接    LENGTH('你好') as length_result,                        -- 长度    CHAR_LENGTH('你好') as char_length_result,              -- 字符数    SUBSTRING('Hello World', 1, 5) as substring_result,     -- 截取    LEFT('Hello World', 5) as left_result,                  -- 左截取    RIGHT('Hello World', 5) as right_result,                -- 右截取    TRIM('  Hello  ') as trim_result,                       -- 去空格    LTRIM('  Hello') as ltrim_result,                       -- 去左空格    RTRIM('Hello  ') as rtrim_result,                       -- 去右空格    UPPER('hello') as upper_result,                         -- 转大写    LOWER('HELLO') as lower_result,                         -- 转小写    REPLACE('Hello World', 'World', 'MySQL') as replace_result, -- 替换    INSTR('Hello World', 'World') as instr_result,          -- 查找位置    REVERSE('Hello') as reverse_result;                     -- 反转
数值函数SELECT     ABS(-10) as abs_result,                                 -- 绝对值    CEIL(3.14) as ceil_result,                              -- 向上取整    FLOOR(3.14) as floor_result,                            -- 向下取整    ROUND(3.14159, 2) as round_result,                      -- 四舍五入    TRUNCATE(3.14159, 2) as truncate_result,                -- 截断    RAND() as rand_result,                                  -- 随机数    POW(2, 3) as pow_result,                                -- 幂运算    SQRT(16) as sqrt_result,                                -- 平方根    MOD(10, 3) as mod_result;                               -- 取模
日期时间函数SELECT     NOW() as now_result,                                    -- 当前时间    CURDATE() as curdate_result,                            -- 当前日期    CURTIME() as curtime_result,                            -- 当前时间    YEAR(NOW()) as year_result,                             -- 年份    MONTH(NOW()) as month_result,                           -- 月份    DAY(NOW()) as day_result,                               -- 日期    HOUR(NOW()) as hour_result,                             -- 小时    MINUTE(NOW()) as minute_result,                         -- 分钟    SECOND(NOW()) as second_result,                         -- 秒    DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) as date_add_result,     -- 日期加法    DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) as date_sub_result,    -- 日期减法    DATEDIFF('2026-12-31', '2026-01-01') as datediff_result,-- 日期差    TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, '2026-01-01', '2026-12-31') as timestampdiff_result,    DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as date_format_result; -- 格式化
聚合函数SELECT     COUNT(*) as total_count,                                -- 计数    COUNT(department) as dept_count,                        -- 非空计数    SUM(salary) as total_salary,                            -- 求和    AVG(salary) as avg_salary,                              -- 平均值    MAX(salary) as max_salary,                              -- 最大值    MIN(salary) as min_salary,                              -- 最小值    GROUP_CONCAT(name) as names_concat;                     -- 分组拼接
1.7 高级特性窗口函数（MySQL 8.0+）-- ROW_NUMBER() - 行号SELECT name, department, salary,    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as row_numFROM employees;-- RANK() - 排名（有并列）SELECT name, department, salary,    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as rank_numFROM employees;-- DENSE_RANK() - 紧密排名（无间隔）SELECT name, department, salary,    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as dense_rank_numFROM employees;-- LEAD/LAG - 前后行数据SELECT name, salary,    LAG(salary, 1) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as prev_salary,    LEAD(salary, 1) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as next_salaryFROM employees;-- SUM() OVER - 累计求和SELECT name, hire_date, salary,    SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) as cumulative_salaryFROM employees;
CTE（公共表表达式）-- 基本 CTEWITH dept_avg AS (    SELECT department, AVG(salary) as avg_salary    FROM employees    GROUP BY department)SELECT e.name, e.department, e.salary, d.avg_salaryFROM employees eJOIN dept_avg d ON e.department = d.departmentWHERE e.salary > d.avg_salary;-- 递归 CTE（树形结构）WITH RECURSIVE employee_tree AS (    SELECT id, name, manager_id, 1 as level    FROM employees    WHERE manager_id IS NULL        UNION ALL        SELECT e.id, e.name, e.manager_id, et.level + 1    FROM employees e    JOIN employee_tree et ON e.manager_id = et.id)SELECT * FROM employee_tree ORDER BY level, id;
JSON 函数-- 创建 JSON 表CREATE TABLE products (    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,    name VARCHAR(100),    attributes JSON);-- 插入 JSON 数据INSERT INTO products (name, attributes) VALUES ('笔记本电脑', '{"brand": "Dell", "price": 5999, "specs": {"cpu": "i7", "ram": "16GB", "storage": "512GB SSD"}}'),('手机', '{"brand": "Apple", "price": 7999, "specs": {"cpu": "A15", "ram": "6GB", "storage": "256GB"}}');-- 查询 JSONSELECT     name,    JSON_EXTRACT(attributes, '$.brand') as brand,    JSON_EXTRACT(attributes, '$.price') as price,    attributes->'$.specs.cpu' as cpuFROM products;-- 修改 JSONUPDATE products SET attributes = JSON_SET(attributes, '$.price', 5499) WHERE name = '笔记本电脑';-- 添加/删除 JSON 元素UPDATE products SET attributes = JSON_INSERT(attributes, '$.color', '银色') WHERE name = '笔记本电脑';UPDATE products SET attributes = JSON_REMOVE(attributes, '$.color') WHERE name = '笔记本电脑';

二、Oracle 语法详解2.1 数据类型数值类型-- NUMBER 类型（通用数值）NUMBER           -- 任意精度NUMBER(p)        -- p位整数NUMBER(p,s)      -- p位总长度，s位小数-- 浮点数类型BINARY_FLOAT     -- 32位浮点数BINARY_DOUBLE    -- 64位浮点数-- 示例CREATE TABLE numbers (    id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,    int_col NUMBER(10),    decimal_col NUMBER(10,2),    float_col BINARY_FLOAT,    double_col BINARY_DOUBLE);
字符串类型-- 定长字符串CHAR(n)          -- 固定长度，最大2000字节NCHAR(n)         -- 固定长度，支持Unicode-- 可变长字符串VARCHAR2(n)      -- 可变长度，最大4000字节NVARCHAR2(n)     -- 可变长度，支持UnicodeCLOB             -- 大文本对象，最大4GBNCLOB            -- Unicode大文本对象-- 示例CREATE TABLE strings (    id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,    char_col CHAR(10),    varchar_col VARCHAR2(100),    clob_col CLOB);
日期时间类型DATE             -- 日期时间，精确到秒TIMESTAMP        -- 时间戳，精确到纳秒TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE        -- 带时区的时间戳TIMESTAMP WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE  -- 带本地时区的时间戳INTERVAL YEAR TO MONTH          -- 年月间隔INTERVAL DAY TO SECOND          -- 日时间隔-- 示例CREATE TABLE dates (    id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,    date_col DATE,    timestamp_col TIMESTAMP,    timestamp_tz_col TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,    interval_col INTERVAL DAY TO SECOND);
2.2 DDL（数据定义语言）创建表空间和用户-- 创建表空间CREATE TABLESPACE my_tablespaceDATAFILE '/u01/app/oracle/oradata/XE/my_tablespace.dbf'SIZE 100MAUTOEXTEND ON NEXT 10M MAXSIZE 500M;-- 创建用户CREATE USER myuser IDENTIFIED BY MyPassword123DEFAULT TABLESPACE my_tablespaceTEMPORARY TABLESPACE tempQUOTA UNLIMITED ON my_tablespace;-- 授予权限GRANT CONNECT, RESOURCE TO myuser;GRANT CREATE SESSION TO myuser;GRANT CREATE TABLE TO myuser;GRANT CREATE VIEW TO myuser;GRANT CREATE SEQUENCE TO myuser;
创建表CREATE TABLE employees (    id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,    emp_no VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,    name VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL,    gender CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'M' CHECK (gender IN ('M', 'F')),    age NUMBER(3) CHECK (age BETWEEN 18 AND 65),    department VARCHAR2(50),    salary NUMBER(10,2),    hire_date DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE,    email VARCHAR2(100) UNIQUE,    phone VARCHAR2(20),    status NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 CHECK (status IN (0, 1)),    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);-- 添加注释COMMENT ON TABLE employees IS '员工表';COMMENT ON COLUMN employees.id IS '员工ID';COMMENT ON COLUMN employees.name IS '姓名';
序列（Sequence）-- 创建序列CREATE SEQUENCE emp_seqSTART WITH 1INCREMENT BY 1NOCACHENOCYCLE;-- 使用序列INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (emp_seq.NEXTVAL, '张三', '技术部');-- 查看当前值SELECT emp_seq.CURRVAL FROM dual;
索引-- B-tree 索引CREATE INDEX idx_department ON employees(department);-- 位图索引（适合低基数列）CREATE BITMAP INDEX idx_gender ON employees(gender);-- 函数索引CREATE INDEX idx_upper_name ON employees(UPPER(name));-- 复合索引CREATE INDEX idx_dept_salary ON employees(department, salary DESC);
视图-- 简单视图CREATE VIEW v_employee_info ASSELECT id, name, department, salaryFROM employeesWHERE status = 1;-- 复杂视图CREATE VIEW v_dept_stats ASSELECT     department,    COUNT(*) as employee_count,    AVG(salary) as avg_salary,    MAX(salary) as max_salary,    MIN(salary) as min_salaryFROM employeesGROUP BY department;
同义词-- 创建同义词CREATE SYNONYM emp FOR employees;CREATE PUBLIC SYNONYM pub_emp FOR employees;
2.3 DML（数据操作语言）插入数据-- 基本插入INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, gender, age, department, salary, hire_date, email) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三', 'M', 28, '技术部', 8000.00, TO_DATE('2020-01-15', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'zhangsan@example.com');-- 插入多行（使用 UNION ALL）INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, department, salary) SELECT 'EMP002', '李四', '市场部', 7500 FROM dualUNION ALLSELECT 'EMP003', '王五', '技术部', 12000 FROM dualUNION ALLSELECT 'EMP004', '赵六', '财务部', 9000 FROM dual;-- 从其他表插入INSERT INTO employees_backup SELECT * FROM employees WHERE hire_date < TO_DATE('2022-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD');
查询数据-- 基本查询SELECT * FROM employees;SELECT id, name, department, salary FROM employees;-- 条件查询SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department = '技术部';SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > 8000 AND age < 35;SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department IN ('技术部', '市场部');SELECT * FROM employees WHERE name LIKE '%三%';SELECT * FROM employees WHERE hire_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('2020-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2021-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD');-- 排序SELECT * FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC, hire_date ASC;-- 限制结果数量（Oracle 12c+）SELECT * FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY;-- 旧版本限制（ROWNUM）SELECT * FROM (    SELECT * FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10;-- 去重SELECT DISTINCT department FROM employees;-- 分组和聚合SELECT department, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(salary) as avg_salary FROM employees GROUP BY department;-- HAVING 子句SELECT department, AVG(salary) as avg_salary FROM employees GROUP BY department HAVING AVG(salary) > 8000;-- 连接查询-- 内连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e INNER JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 左外连接（Oracle 特有语法）SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e, departments d WHERE e.department_id = d.id(+);-- 标准左外连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 子查询SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees);-- EXISTS 子查询SELECT * FROM employees e WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.employee_id = e.id);-- CASE 表达式SELECT name, salary,    CASE         WHEN salary >= 10000 THEN '高薪'        WHEN salary >= 8000 THEN '中薪'        ELSE '低薪'    END as salary_levelFROM employees;
PIVOT 和 UNPIVOT-- PIVOT（行转列）SELECT * FROM (    SELECT department, salary    FROM employees)PIVOT (    AVG(salary) as avg_salary,    COUNT(*) as count    FOR department IN ('技术部' as tech, '市场部' as market, '财务部' as finance));-- UNPIVOT（列转行）SELECT * FROM (    SELECT 'Q1' as quarter, 100 as sales, 200 as profit FROM dual    UNION ALL    SELECT 'Q2', 150, 250 FROM dual)UNPIVOT (    value FOR metric IN (sales, profit));
更新数据-- 基本更新UPDATE employees SET salary = 8500 WHERE id = 1;-- 更新多列UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.1, status = 1 WHERE department = '技术部';-- 使用子查询更新UPDATE employees eSET salary = (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees WHERE department = e.department)WHERE age > 30;-- MERGE 语句（合并插入和更新）MERGE INTO employees eUSING (SELECT 'EMP001' as emp_no, '张三' as name, 8500 as salary FROM dual) srcON (e.emp_no = src.emp_no)WHEN MATCHED THEN    UPDATE SET e.salary = src.salaryWHEN NOT MATCHED THEN    INSERT (emp_no, name, salary) VALUES (src.emp_no, src.name, src.salary);
删除数据-- 删除单行DELETE FROM employees WHERE id = 1;-- 删除多行DELETE FROM employees WHERE hire_date < TO_DATE('2019-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD');-- 清空表（保留结构，不记录日志，速度快）TRUNCATE TABLE employees;
2.4 PL/SQL 编程存储过程-- 创建存储过程CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE update_employee_salary(    p_emp_id IN NUMBER,    p_new_salary IN NUMBER,    p_result OUT VARCHAR2) AS    v_old_salary NUMBER;BEGIN    -- 查询当前薪资    SELECT salary INTO v_old_salary FROM employees WHERE id = p_emp_id;        -- 更新薪资    UPDATE employees SET salary = p_new_salary WHERE id = p_emp_id;        -- 设置返回结果    p_result := '员工ID ' || p_emp_id || ' 薪资从 ' || v_old_salary || ' 更新为 ' || p_new_salary;        -- 提交事务    COMMIT;    EXCEPTION    WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN        p_result := '未找到员工ID: ' || p_emp_id;        ROLLBACK;    WHEN OTHERS THEN        p_result := '错误: ' || SQLERRM;        ROLLBACK;END;/-- 调用存储过程DECLARE    v_result VARCHAR2(500);BEGIN    update_employee_salary(1, 9000, v_result);    DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_result);END;/
函数-- 创建函数CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_employee_count(    p_department VARCHAR2) RETURN NUMBER AS    v_count NUMBER;BEGIN    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO v_count     FROM employees     WHERE department = p_department;        RETURN v_count;EXCEPTION    WHEN OTHERS THEN        RETURN 0;END;/-- 调用函数SELECT get_employee_count('技术部') as tech_count FROM dual;-- 在查询中使用SELECT department, get_employee_count(department) as emp_countFROM (SELECT DISTINCT department FROM employees);
触发器-- 创建触发器（更新时自动更新时间戳）CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER trg_update_timestampBEFORE UPDATE ON employeesFOR EACH ROWBEGIN    :NEW.updated_at := CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;END;/-- 创建触发器（审计日志）CREATE TABLE employee_audit (    audit_id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,    employee_id NUMBER,    operation VARCHAR2(10),    old_salary NUMBER,    new_salary NUMBER,    changed_by VARCHAR2(100),    changed_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER trg_employee_auditAFTER UPDATE OF salary ON employeesFOR EACH ROWBEGIN    INSERT INTO employee_audit (employee_id, operation, old_salary, new_salary, changed_by)    VALUES (:OLD.id, 'UPDATE', :OLD.salary, :NEW.salary, USER);END;/
游标-- 显式游标DECLARE    CURSOR emp_cursor IS        SELECT id, name, salary FROM employees WHERE department = '技术部';    v_emp_id employees.id%TYPE;    v_name employees.name%TYPE;    v_salary employees.salary%TYPE;BEGIN    OPEN emp_cursor;    LOOP        FETCH emp_cursor INTO v_emp_id, v_name, v_salary;        EXIT WHEN emp_cursor%NOTFOUND;                DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('ID: ' || v_emp_id || ', Name: ' || v_name || ', Salary: ' || v_salary);    END LOOP;    CLOSE emp_cursor;END;/-- 游标 FOR 循环DECLARE    CURSOR emp_cursor IS        SELECT id, name, salary FROM employees WHERE department = '技术部';BEGIN    FOR emp_rec IN emp_cursor LOOP        DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE('ID: ' || emp_rec.id || ', Name: ' || emp_rec.name || ', Salary: ' || emp_rec.salary);    END LOOP;END;/
2.5 高级特性分析函数（窗口函数）-- ROW_NUMBER()SELECT name, department, salary,    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as row_numFROM employees;-- RANK() 和 DENSE_RANK()SELECT name, department, salary,    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as rank_num,    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as dense_rank_numFROM employees;-- LEAD/LAGSELECT name, salary,    LAG(salary, 1) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as prev_salary,    LEAD(salary, 1) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as next_salaryFROM employees;-- SUM() OVERSELECT name, hire_date, salary,    SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) as cumulative_salaryFROM employees;-- FIRST_VALUE/LAST_VALUESELECT name, department, salary,    FIRST_VALUE(name) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as highest_paidFROM employees;
闪回查询-- 查询过去某个时间点的数据SELECT * FROM employees AS OF TIMESTAMP (SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1' HOUR)WHERE id = 1;-- 闪回表（恢复到某个时间点）FLASHBACK TABLE employees TO TIMESTAMP (SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1' DAY);
分区表-- 范围分区CREATE TABLE sales (    sale_id NUMBER,    sale_date DATE,    amount NUMBER)PARTITION BY RANGE (sale_date) (    PARTITION p2023 VALUES LESS THAN (TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')),    PARTITION p2024 VALUES LESS THAN (TO_DATE('2025-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')),    PARTITION p2025 VALUES LESS THAN (TO_DATE('2026-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')),    PARTITION pmax VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE));-- 列表分区CREATE TABLE employees_by_region (    id NUMBER,    name VARCHAR2(50),    region VARCHAR2(20))PARTITION BY LIST (region) (    PARTITION p_north VALUES ('北京', '天津', '河北'),    PARTITION p_south VALUES ('广东', '广西', '海南'),    PARTITION p_east VALUES ('上海', '江苏', '浙江'),    PARTITION p_west VALUES ('四川', '重庆', '云南'));

三、PostgreSQL 语法详解3.1 数据类型数值类型-- 整数类型SMALLINT         -- 2字节，范围 -32768 到 32767INTEGER/INT      -- 4字节，范围 -2147483648 到 2147483647BIGINT           -- 8字节，范围 -9223372036854775808 到 9223372036854775807SERIAL           -- 自增整数（4字节）BIGSERIAL        -- 自增大整数（8字节）-- 精确数值NUMERIC(p,s)     -- 任意精度，p为总位数，s为小数位DECIMAL(p,s)     -- 同 NUMERIC-- 浮点数REAL             -- 4字节浮点数DOUBLE PRECISION -- 8字节浮点数-- 示例CREATE TABLE numbers (    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,    small_int SMALLINT,    int_col INTEGER,    big_int BIGINT,    numeric_col NUMERIC(10,2),    real_col REAL,    double_col DOUBLE PRECISION);
字符串类型CHAR(n)          -- 定长字符串VARCHAR(n)       -- 可变长字符串TEXT             -- 无限长度文本CITEXT           -- 不区分大小写的文本（需要扩展）-- 示例CREATE TABLE strings (    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,    char_col CHAR(10),    varchar_col VARCHAR(100),    text_col TEXT,    citext_col CITEXT);
日期时间类型DATE             -- 日期TIME             -- 时间TIMESTAMP        -- 日期时间TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE    -- 带时区的时间戳INTERVAL         -- 时间间隔-- 示例CREATE TABLE dates (    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,    date_col DATE,    time_col TIME,    timestamp_col TIMESTAMP,    timestamptz_col TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,    interval_col INTERVAL);
特殊类型-- 布尔类型BOOLEAN/BOOL     -- true/false-- 枚举类型CREATE TYPE mood AS ENUM ('sad', 'ok', 'happy');-- 范围类型INT4RANGE        -- 整数范围INT8RANGE        -- 大整数范围NUMRANGE         -- 数值范围TSRANGE          -- 时间戳范围TSTZRANGE        -- 带时区时间戳范围DATERANGE        -- 日期范围-- JSON 类型JSON             -- JSON 数据（存储为文本）JSONB            -- JSON 数据（二进制格式，支持索引）-- 数组类型INTEGER[]        -- 整数数组TEXT[]           -- 文本数组VARCHAR(50)[]    -- 可变长字符串数组-- 几何类型POINT            -- 点LINE             -- 线LSEG             -- 线段BOX              -- 矩形PATH             -- 路径POLYGON          -- 多边形CIRCLE           -- 圆-- 网络地址类型INET             -- IP 地址CIDR             -- 网络地址MACADDR          -- MAC 地址-- 示例CREATE TABLE special_types (    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,    is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,    user_mood mood,    age_range INT4RANGE,    price_range NUMRANGE,    json_data JSON,    jsonb_data JSONB,    tags TEXT[],    location POINT,    ip_address INET);
3.2 DDL（数据定义语言）创建数据库和模式-- 创建数据库CREATE DATABASE mydb    WITH     OWNER = postgres    ENCODING = 'UTF8'    LC_COLLATE = 'zh_CN.UTF-8'    LC_CTYPE = 'zh_CN.UTF-8'    TABLESPACE = pg_default    CONNECTION LIMIT = -1;-- 创建模式CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS my_schema;CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS app_schema AUTHORIZATION appuser;-- 设置搜索路径SET search_path TO my_schema, public;
创建表CREATE TABLE employees (    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,    emp_no VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,    gender CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'M' CHECK (gender IN ('M', 'F')),    age SMALLINT CHECK (age BETWEEN 18 AND 65),    department VARCHAR(50),    salary NUMERIC(10,2),    hire_date DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,    phone VARCHAR(20),    status SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 CHECK (status IN (0, 1)),    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,    tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',    metadata JSONB);-- 添加注释COMMENT ON TABLE employees IS '员工表';COMMENT ON COLUMN employees.id IS '员工ID';COMMENT ON COLUMN employees.name IS '姓名';
约束-- 外键约束ALTER TABLE employees ADD CONSTRAINT fk_department FOREIGN KEY (department_id) REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;-- 唯一约束ALTER TABLE employees ADD CONSTRAINT uk_email UNIQUE (email);-- 检查约束ALTER TABLE employees ADD CONSTRAINT chk_salary CHECK (salary > 0);-- 排他约束（防止重叠）CREATE TABLE reservations (    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,    room_id INTEGER,    during TSRANGE,    EXCLUDE USING gist (room_id WITH =, during WITH &&));
索引-- B-tree 索引（默认）CREATE INDEX idx_department ON employees(department);-- 唯一索引CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_email ON employees(email);-- 复合索引CREATE INDEX idx_dept_salary ON employees(department, salary DESC);-- 部分索引（只索引部分数据）CREATE INDEX idx_active_employees ON employees(id) WHERE status = 1;-- 表达式索引CREATE INDEX idx_upper_name ON employees(UPPER(name));-- GIN 索引（用于 JSONB、数组）CREATE INDEX idx_metadata_gin ON employees USING GIN (metadata);CREATE INDEX idx_tags_gin ON employees USING GIN (tags);-- GiST 索引（用于范围、几何类型）CREATE INDEX idx_during_gist ON reservations USING GiST (during);
视图和物化视图-- 普通视图CREATE VIEW v_employee_info ASSELECT id, name, department, salaryFROM employeesWHERE status = 1;-- 物化视图（存储实际数据，需要刷新）CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_dept_stats ASSELECT     department,    COUNT(*) as employee_count,    AVG(salary) as avg_salary,    MAX(salary) as max_salary,    MIN(salary) as min_salaryFROM employeesGROUP BY department;-- 刷新物化视图REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_dept_stats;REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY mv_dept_stats;  -- 不阻塞查询
3.3 DML（数据操作语言）插入数据-- 基本插入INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, gender, age, department, salary, hire_date, email) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三', 'M', 28, '技术部', 8000.00, '2020-01-15', 'zhangsan@example.com');-- 插入多行INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, department, salary) VALUES ('EMP002', '李四', '市场部', 7500),('EMP003', '王五', '技术部', 12000),('EMP004', '赵六', '财务部', 9000);-- 返回插入的值INSERT INTO employees (name, department, salary) VALUES ('孙七', '人事部', 7000)RETURNING id, name, salary;-- 从其他表插入INSERT INTO employees_backup SELECT * FROM employees WHERE hire_date < '2022-01-01';-- 插入时忽略冲突INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三') ON CONFLICT (emp_no) DO NOTHING;-- 插入时更新冲突INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, salary) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三', 8500) ON CONFLICT (emp_no) DO UPDATE SET salary = EXCLUDED.salary;
查询数据-- 基本查询SELECT * FROM employees;SELECT id, name, department, salary FROM employees;-- 条件查询SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department = '技术部';SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > 8000 AND age < 35;SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department IN ('技术部', '市场部');SELECT * FROM employees WHERE name LIKE '%三%';SELECT * FROM employees WHERE hire_date BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2021-12-31';-- 排序SELECT * FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC, hire_date ASC;-- 限制结果数量SELECT * FROM employees LIMIT 10;SELECT * FROM employees LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;-- 去重SELECT DISTINCT department FROM employees;-- 分组和聚合SELECT department, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(salary) as avg_salary FROM employees GROUP BY department;-- HAVING 子句SELECT department, AVG(salary) as avg_salary FROM employees GROUP BY department HAVING AVG(salary) > 8000;-- 连接查询-- 内连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e INNER JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 左连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 全外连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e FULL OUTER JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id;-- 交叉连接SELECT e.name, d.department_name FROM employees e CROSS JOIN departments d;-- 子查询SELECT * FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees);-- EXISTS 子查询SELECT * FROM employees e WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.employee_id = e.id);-- CASE 表达式SELECT name, salary,    CASE         WHEN salary >= 10000 THEN '高薪'        WHEN salary >= 8000 THEN '中薪'        ELSE '低薪'    END as salary_levelFROM employees;-- WITH 子句（CTE）WITH dept_avg AS (    SELECT department, AVG(salary) as avg_salary    FROM employees    GROUP BY department)SELECT e.name, e.department, e.salary, d.avg_salaryFROM employees eJOIN dept_avg d ON e.department = d.departmentWHERE e.salary > d.avg_salary;
窗口函数-- ROW_NUMBER()SELECT name, department, salary,    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as row_numFROM employees;-- RANK() 和 DENSE_RANK()SELECT name, department, salary,    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as rank_num,    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as dense_rank_numFROM employees;-- NTILE（分桶）SELECT name, salary,    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as quartileFROM employees;-- LEAD/LAGSELECT name, salary,    LAG(salary, 1) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as prev_salary,    LEAD(salary, 1) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as next_salaryFROM employees;-- FIRST_VALUE/LAST_VALUESELECT name, department, salary,    FIRST_VALUE(name) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as highest_paidFROM employees;-- SUM() OVERSELECT name, hire_date, salary,    SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) as cumulative_salaryFROM employees;
更新数据-- 基本更新UPDATE employees SET salary = 8500 WHERE id = 1;-- 更新多列UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.1, status = 1 WHERE department = '技术部';-- 使用子查询更新UPDATE employees eSET salary = (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees WHERE department = e.department)WHERE age > 30;-- FROM 子句更新UPDATE employees eSET salary = d.avg_salaryFROM (    SELECT department, AVG(salary) as avg_salary    FROM employees    GROUP BY department) dWHERE e.department = d.department;-- 返回更新的值UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.1 WHERE department = '技术部'RETURNING id, name, salary;
删除数据-- 删除单行DELETE FROM employees WHERE id = 1;-- 删除多行DELETE FROM employees WHERE hire_date < '2019-01-01';-- 返回删除的值DELETE FROM employees WHERE id = 1 RETURNING *;-- 清空表（保留结构）TRUNCATE TABLE employees;TRUNCATE TABLE employees RESTART IDENTITY;  -- 重置自增序列
UPSERT（插入或更新）-- 使用 INSERT ... ON CONFLICTINSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name, salary) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三', 8500) ON CONFLICT (emp_no) DO UPDATE SET salary = EXCLUDED.salary, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;-- 忽略冲突INSERT INTO employees (emp_no, name) VALUES ('EMP001', '张三') ON CONFLICT (emp_no) DO NOTHING;
3.4 高级特性JSON/JSONB 操作-- 插入 JSONB 数据INSERT INTO employees (name, metadata) VALUES ('张三', '{"skills": ["Java", "Python"], "experience": 5, "certifications": ["Oracle", "AWS"]}'),('李四', '{"skills": ["JavaScript", "React"], "experience": 3, "projects": 10}');-- 查询 JSONBSELECT     name,    metadata->>'skills' as skills,    metadata->'experience' as experience,    metadata @> '{"skills": ["Java"]}' as has_java_skillFROM employees;-- JSONB 函数SELECT     name,    jsonb_array_length(metadata->'skills') as skill_count,    jsonb_pretty(metadata) as pretty_jsonFROM employees;-- 修改 JSONBUPDATE employees SET metadata = jsonb_set(metadata, '{experience}', '6') WHERE name = '张三';-- 添加/删除键值UPDATE employees SET metadata = metadata || '{"location": "北京"}' WHERE name = '张三';UPDATE employees SET metadata = metadata - 'location' WHERE name = '张三';
数组操作-- 插入数组数据INSERT INTO employees (name, tags) VALUES ('张三', '{"技术", "后端", "Java"}'),('李四', '{"市场", "销售", "客户关系"}');-- 查询数组SELECT name, tags FROM employees WHERE '技术' = ANY(tags);SELECT name, tags FROM employees WHERE tags && '{"Java", "Python"}';  -- 有交集SELECT name, tags FROM employees WHERE tags @> '{"技术", "后端"}';     -- 包含-- 数组函数SELECT     name,    array_length(tags, 1) as tag_count,    array_to_string(tags, ', ') as tags_string,    unnest(tags) as tagFROM employees;-- 修改数组UPDATE employees SET tags = array_append(tags, '管理') WHERE name = '张三';UPDATE employees SET tags = array_remove(tags, '销售') WHERE name = '李四';
全文搜索-- 创建全文搜索索引ALTER TABLE employees ADD COLUMN search_vector TSVECTOR;UPDATE employees SET search_vector = to_tsvector('chinese', name || ' ' || department || ' ' || COALESCE(email, ''));CREATE INDEX idx_search_vector ON employees USING GIN (search_vector);-- 创建触发器自动更新CREATE TRIGGER trg_update_search_vectorBEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON employeesFOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTIONtsvector_update_trigger(search_vector, 'pg_catalog.chinese', name, department, email);-- 全文搜索查询SELECT * FROM employees WHERE search_vector @@ to_tsquery('chinese', '技术 & Java');-- 排名搜索结果SELECT name, department,     ts_rank(search_vector, to_tsquery('chinese', '技术')) as rankFROM employees WHERE search_vector @@ to_tsquery('chinese', '技术')ORDER BY rank DESC;
CTE 递归查询-- 组织架构树形查询WITH RECURSIVE org_tree AS (    -- 锚点成员：顶层领导    SELECT id, name, manager_id, 1 as level    FROM employees    WHERE manager_id IS NULL        UNION ALL        -- 递归成员：下属    SELECT e.id, e.name, e.manager_id, ot.level + 1    FROM employees e    INNER JOIN org_tree ot ON e.manager_id = ot.id)SELECT * FROM org_tree ORDER BY level, id;
事务隔离级别-- 设置事务隔离级别BEGIN;SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED;      -- 读已提交（默认）-- SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;  -- 读未提交-- SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL REPEATABLE READ;    -- 可重复读-- SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL SERIALIZABLE;       -- 串行化COMMIT;
表继承-- 创建父表CREATE TABLE people (    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,    name VARCHAR(100),    birth_date DATE);-- 创建子表CREATE TABLE employees (    emp_no VARCHAR(20),    department VARCHAR(50),    salary NUMERIC(10,2)) INHERITS (people);CREATE TABLE students (    student_no VARCHAR(20),    major VARCHAR(50),    grade INTEGER) INHERITS (people);-- 查询所有人员（包括子表）SELECT * FROM people;-- 只查询父表SELECT * FROM ONLY people;

四、Redis 语法详解4.1 数据类型String（字符串）# 设置值SET key "value"SET user:1001:name "张三"# 获取值GET keyGET user:1001:name# 设置多个键值对MSET key1 "value1" key2 "value2" key3 "value3"# 获取多个值MGET key1 key2 key3# 设置值并指定过期时间（秒）SETEX key 60 "value"  # 60秒后过期# 设置值并指定过期时间（毫秒）PSETEX key 60000 "value"  # 60000毫秒后过期# 设置值（仅当键不存在时）SETNX key "value"# 设置值并返回旧值GETSET key "new_value"# 追加字符串APPEND key "append_text"# 获取字符串长度STRLEN key# 设置位SETBIT key offset value# 获取位GETBIT key offset# 位计数BITCOUNT key# 位运算BITOP AND destkey key1 key2BITOP OR destkey key1 key2BITOP XOR destkey key1 key2BITOP NOT destkey key# 自增/自减INCR key              # +1INCRBY key increment  # +incrementDECR key              # -1DECRBY key decrement  # -decrementINCRBYFLOAT key increment  # 浮点数自增
Hash（哈希）# 设置字段值HSET user:1001 name "张三" age 28 email "zhangsan@example.com"# 获取字段值HGET user:1001 nameHGET user:1001 age# 获取所有字段和值HGETALL user:1001# 获取多个字段值HMGET user:1001 name age email# 设置多个字段值HMSET user:1001 city "北京" phone "13800138000"# 删除字段HDEL user:1001 phone# 判断字段是否存在HEXISTS user:1001 name# 获取字段数量HLEN user:1001# 获取所有字段名HKEYS user:1001# 获取所有字段值HVALS user:1001# 自增字段值HINCRBY user:1001 age 1HINCRBYFLOAT user:1001 salary 500.5
List（列表）# 从左侧插入LPUSH mylist "item1" "item2" "item3"# 从右侧插入RPUSH mylist "item4" "item5"# 从左侧弹出LPOP mylist# 从右侧弹出RPOP mylist# 获取列表长度LLEN mylist# 获取范围内的元素LRANGE mylist 0 -1  # 获取所有元素LRANGE mylist 0 9   # 获取前10个元素# 获取指定索引的元素LINDEX mylist 0# 设置指定索引的元素LSET mylist 0 "new_item"# 删除指定元素LREM mylist 0 "item_to_remove"  # 删除所有匹配项LREM mylist 2 "item_to_remove"  # 删除前2个匹配项# 修剪列表LTRIM mylist 0 99  # 只保留前100个元素# 阻塞弹出（用于消息队列）BLPOP mylist 30  # 阻塞30秒，从左侧弹出BRPOP mylist 30  # 阻塞30秒，从右侧弹出# 列表间移动元素RPOPLPUSH source_list dest_listBRPOPLPUSH source_list dest_list 30  # 阻塞版本
Set（集合）# 添加元素SADD myset "item1" "item2" "item3"# 删除元素SREM myset "item1"# 判断元素是否存在SISMEMBER myset "item1"# 获取所有元素SMEMBERS myset# 随机获取元素SRANDMEMBER mysetSRANDMEMBER myset 3  # 随机获取3个元素# 随机弹出元素SPOP mysetSPOP myset 2  # 弹出2个元素# 获取集合大小SCARD myset# 集合运算SINTER set1 set2 set3        # 交集SUNION set1 set2 set3        # 并集SDIFF set1 set2              # 差集（set1 - set2）# 集合运算并存储结果SINTERSTORE destset set1 set2SUNIONSTORE destset set1 set2SDIFFSTORE destset set1 set2# 移动元素SMOVE source_set dest_set "item1"
Sorted Set（有序集合）# 添加元素（带分数）ZADD myzset 1 "item1" 2 "item2" 3 "item3"# 获取元素分数ZSCORE myzset "item1"# 获取排名ZRANK myzset "item1"      # 升序排名ZREVRANK myzset "item1"   # 降序排名# 获取指定范围的元素ZRANGE myzset 0 -1 WITHSCORES        # 升序ZREVRANGE myzset 0 -1 WITHSCORES     # 降序# 获取指定分数范围的元素ZRANGEBYSCORE myzset 0 100 WITHSCORESZREVRANGEBYSCORE myzset 100 0 WITHSCORES# 获取排名范围的元素数量ZCOUNT myzset 0 100# 自增分数ZINCRBY myzset 5 "item1"# 删除元素ZREM myzset "item1"# 删除指定分数范围的元素ZREMRANGEBYSCORE myzset 0 10# 删除指定排名范围的元素ZREMRANGEBYRANK myzset 0 9  # 删除前10个# 集合运算ZINTERSTORE destkey 2 key1 key2 WEIGHTS 1 2 AGGREGATE SUMZUNIONSTORE destkey 2 key1 key2 WEIGHTS 1 2 AGGREGATE MAX
Bitmap（位图）# 设置位SETBIT user:online:20260419 1001 1  # 用户1001今天在线# 获取位GETBIT user:online:20260419 1001# 位计数（统计在线用户数）BITCOUNT user:online:20260419# 位运算（统计多天都在线的用户）BITOP AND user:online:common user:online:20260418 user:online:20260419BITCOUNT user:online:common
HyperLogLog（基数统计）# 添加元素PFADD unique_visitors "user1" "user2" "user3"# 获取基数（唯一元素数量）PFCOUNT unique_visitors# 合并多个 HyperLogLogPFADD visitors_day1 "user1" "user2"PFADD visitors_day2 "user2" "user3"PFMERGE visitors_total visitors_day1 visitors_day2PFCOUNT visitors_total
Geo（地理空间）# 添加地理位置GEOADD cities 116.4074 39.9042 "北京"GEOADD cities 121.4737 31.2304 "上海" 113.2644 23.1291 "广州"# 获取地理位置GEOPOS cities "北京" "上海"# 计算距离GEODIST cities "北京" "上海" km  # 单位：m, km, mi, ft# 获取指定范围内的位置GEORADIUS cities 116.4074 39.9042 1000 km WITHDIST WITHCOORDGEORADIUSBYMEMBER cities "北京" 1000 km WITHDIST# 获取元素的 hash 值GEOHASH cities "北京" "上海"
4.2 键操作# 查看键是否存在EXISTS key1 key2# 删除键DEL key1 key2# 重命名键RENAME oldkey newkeyRENAMENX oldkey newkey  # 仅当 newkey 不存在时重命名# 设置过期时间EXPIRE key 60           # 60秒后过期PEXPIRE key 60000       # 60000毫秒后过期EXPIREAT key timestamp  # 指定时间戳过期PERSIST key             # 移除过期时间# 查看过期时间TTL key                 # 剩余秒数PTTL key                # 剩余毫秒数# 获取键的类型TYPE key# 随机获取键RANDOMKEY# 查找键（模式匹配）KEYS pattern            # 不推荐在生产环境使用SCAN cursor MATCH pattern COUNT count  # 推荐使用# 移动键到其他数据库MOVE key db# 排序SORT key BY pattern GET pattern LIMIT offset count ASC|DESC ALPHA
4.3 事务# 开启事务MULTI# 执行命令（加入队列）SET key1 "value1"INCR counterLPUSH mylist "item"# 执行事务EXEC# 取消事务DISCARD# 监视键（乐观锁）WATCH key1 key2MULTI# ... 执行命令EXEC  # 如果被监视的键被修改，事务会失败UNWATCH  # 取消监视
4.4 发布订阅# 订阅频道SUBSCRIBE channel1 channel2# 取消订阅UNSUBSCRIBE channel1# 订阅模式（通配符）PSUBSCRIBE news.*PUNSUBSCRIBE news.*# 发布消息PUBLISH channel1 "Hello, World!"
4.5 Lua 脚本# 执行 Lua 脚本EVAL "return redis.call('GET', KEYS[1])" 1 key1# 脚本示例：原子性地增加计数器并检查阈值EVAL "    local current = redis.call('INCR', KEYS[1])    if current > tonumber(ARGV[1]) then        return redis.error_reply('Exceeded limit')    end    return current" 1 counter 100# 加载脚本（返回 SHA1 哈希）SCRIPT LOAD "return redis.call('GET', KEYS[1])"# 使用 SHA1 执行脚本EVALSHA sha1_hash 1 key1# 检查脚本是否存在SCRIPT EXISTS sha1_hash1 sha1_hash2# 刷新脚本缓存SCRIPT FLUSH
4.6 持久化# RDB 快照SAVE          # 同步保存（阻塞）BGSAVE        # 后台保存（推荐）LASTSAVE      # 查看上次保存时间# AOF 配置CONFIG SET appendonly yesCONFIG SET appendfsync always    # 每次写入都同步CONFIG SET appendfsync everysec  # 每秒同步（推荐）CONFIG SET appendfsync no        # 由操作系统决定# AOF 重写BGREWRITEAOF
4.7 集群和复制# 查看服务器信息INFOINFO serverINFO clientsINFO memoryINFO persistenceINFO statsINFO replicationINFO cpuINFO cluster# 主从复制SLAVEOF master_ip master_port  # 设置主服务器（旧版本）REPLICAOF master_ip master_port  # 设置主服务器（新版本）REPLICAOF NO ONE                # 停止复制# 集群命令CLUSTER INFO        # 集群信息CLUSTER NODES       # 集群节点CLUSTER SLOTS       # 哈希槽分布CLUSTER KEYSLOT key # 计算键的哈希槽
4.8 实战示例1. 用户会话管理# 存储用户会话（30分钟过期）SETEX session:user:1001 1800 "{'user_id':1001,'username':'zhangsan','login_time':'2026-04-19 10:00:00'}"# 验证会话GET session:user:1001# 刷新会话过期时间EXPIRE session:user:1001 1800# 删除会话DEL session:user:1001
2. 计数器# 页面访问计数INCR page:views:homeINCRBY page:views:home 5# 获取计数GET page:views:home
3. 排行榜# 添加分数ZADD leaderboard 100 "player1" 150 "player2" 200 "player3"# 获取排行榜（前10名）ZREVRANGE leaderboard 0 9 WITHSCORES# 获取玩家排名ZREVRANK leaderboard "player1"# 增加分数ZINCRBY leaderboard 50 "player1"
4. 消息队列# 生产者：推送消息LPUSH task_queue "task_data_1"LPUSH task_queue "task_data_2"# 消费者：阻塞弹出消息BRPOP task_queue 30# 延迟队列（使用有序集合）ZADD delay_queue 1703000000 "task_data_1"  # 时间戳作为分数# 消费者定期检查ZRANGEBYSCORE delay_queue 0 1703000000 LIMIT 0 10ZREMRANGEBYSCORE delay_queue 0 1703000000
5. 缓存策略# 缓存数据（设置过期时间）SETEX cache:user:1001 3600 "user_data_json"# 缓存穿透保护（空值缓存）SETEX cache:user:999 60 "null"# 缓存雪崩预防（随机过期时间）EXPIRE cache:key 3600 + RANDOM(0, 300)
6. 限流器# 固定窗口限流INCR rate_limit:user:1001:2026041910EXPIRE rate_limit:user:1001:2026041910 60GET rate_limit:user:1001:2026041910# 滑动窗口限流（使用列表）LPUSH rate_limit:user:1001 "1703000000"LTRIM rate_limit:user:1001 0 99  # 保留最近100个请求LINDEX rate_limit:user:1001 99   # 获取第100个请求的时间

五、数据库语法对比5.1 数据类型对比



特性
MySQL
Oracle
PostgreSQL
Redis

JSON 支持

ENUM

5.2 语法差异对比



操作

分页

ROWNUM / FETCH

5.3 事务隔离级别



隔离级别
MySQL
Oracle

说明

✅

5.4 性能特点



数据库

性能特点




MySQL

Oracle

功能强大，高可用性好


PostgreSQL
